name: SCC_GetPreparedEXIMessage
title: SCC_GetPreparedEXIMessage
syntax: long SCC_GetPreparedEXIMessage ( byte data[], dword& dataLength ) // form 1
description: Finalizes a message without sending. The message data is returned to an output buffer instead. Usually this data consists of the V2G header and the EXI encoded V2G payload.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.description: Output buffer for the message. Make sure to use a buffer that is large enough (some messages may take up to 10 kB).

return: The Id attribute of the message body, if existing (to the output buffer)
